name: supabase-debug-playground
description: 5-episode Supabase debugging video series — break, run, fix, verify

scripts.ep1:reset: git checkout -- supabase/functions/echo/index.ts && echo 'EP1 reset: index.ts restored'
scripts.ep3:reset: git checkout -- scripts/ep3_crud.ts && echo 'EP3 reset: ep3_crud.ts restored'
scripts.ep5:reset: git checkout -- supabase/types.gen.ts && docker exec supabase_db_supabase-debug-playground psql -U postgres -c 'alter table public.receipts drop column if exists notes;' && echo 'EP5 reset: column dropped, types restored'
scripts.ep1:prompt: pbcopy < prompts/ep1.md && echo 'EP1 prompt copied to clipboard — paste into a new chat'
scripts.ep2:prompt: pbcopy < prompts/ep2.md && echo 'EP2 prompt copied to clipboard — paste into a new chat'
scripts.ep3:prompt: pbcopy < prompts/ep3.md && echo 'EP3 prompt copied to clipboard — paste into a new chat'
scripts.ep4:prompt: pbcopy < prompts/ep4.md && echo 'EP4 prompt copied to clipboard — paste into a new chat'
scripts.ep5:prompt: pbcopy < prompts/ep5.md && echo 'EP5 prompt copied to clipboard — paste into a new chat'
scripts.reset:code: git checkout -- . && git clean -fd && echo 'Code reset: all tracked file changes reverted'
